title: dianthus zeyheri
intro: Dianthus zeyheri, also known as Cape Pink or Zeyher's Pink, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, native to the southwestern and western parts of South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dianthus zeyheri are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating digestive issues. Dianthus zeyheri is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and may also be used in topical applications for skin conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
